Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3

Class FlixelLwjgl3Launcher

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
public class FlixelLwjgl3Launcher extends Object
Launches the desktop (LWJGL3) version of the Flixel game.

    Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode using the given configuration.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelLwjgl3Launcher

      public FlixelLwjgl3Launcher()

  • Method Details

    • launch

      public static void launch(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelGame game)
      Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode and with a default configuration object. This should be called from the main method of the libGDX LWJGL3 launcher class, and the game instance should be created in the same general area.
      Parameters:
      game - The game instance to launch.

    • launch

      public static void launch(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelGame game, String... icons)
      Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode and with pre-made configuration object. This should be called from the main method of the libGDX LWJGL3 launcher class, and the game instance should be created in the same general area.
      Parameters:
      game - The game instance to launch.
      icons - Window icon paths. Make sure your icons actually exist and are valid!

    • launch

      public static void launch(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelGame game, me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.runtime.FlixelRuntimeMode runtimeMode, String... icons)
      Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game with the given runtime mode and a pre-made configuration object. This should be called from the main method of the libGDX LWJGL3 launcher class, and the game instance should be created in the same general area.
      Parameters:
      game - The game instance to launch.
      runtimeMode - The FlixelRuntimeMode for this session (TEST, DEBUG, or RELEASE).
      icons - Window icon paths. Make sure your icons actually exist and are valid!

    • launch

      public static void launch(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelGame game, me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.runtime.FlixelRuntimeMode runtimeMode, com.badlogic.gdx.backends.lwjgl3.Lwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration configuration)
      Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode using the given configuration. This should be called from the main method of the libGDX LWJGL3 launcher class.

      This method is useful if you have an existing libGDX project with an already made configuration object and you want to integrate FlixelGDX into it.

      Parameters:
      game - The game instance to launch.
      runtimeMode - The FlixelRuntimeMode for this session (TEST, DEBUG, or RELEASE).
      configuration - The Lwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration to use.
